items.title: Ligand to Participate in September Investor Conferences
items.author: Todd Davis And Tavo Espinoza
items.description: Ligand Pharmaceuticals executives will participate in two upcoming investor conferences: Citi 20th Annual BioPharma Conference in Boston and H.C. Wainwright 27th Annual Global Investment Conference in New York, presenting and hosting investor meetings.
